GuidebookDescription: Standard pistol ammunition. Affordable, common, and adequate against unarmored threats.
Standard SMG rounds optimized for high-rate fire. Balanced damage, low armor penetration, and heavy consumption pressure.
Lower-report pistol ammunition for suppressed work. Damage falls slightly, but noise control can prevent a bad fight from becoming a raid magnet.
Intermediate rifle ammunition used for patrol carbines. Strong general performance and widely supported.
High-velocity rifle ammunition tuned for precision. Better range stability and armor pressure with a sharper recoil impulse.
Shotgun shells loaded for close-range stopping power. Effective in tight spaces, but loud and poor at distance.
Full-power precision ammunition intended for long shots and hard targets. Loud report and heavy recoil, but excellent penetration.
